name: Quebec Tourtiere
recipeInstructions:
Mix meat, onion, spices in a saucepan. Add boiling water. Simmer, uncovered for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally. Skim off any fat.
Preheat oven to 375°F. Roll out half of the pastry and line 9-inch pie plate. Place filling in pie plate and cover with the remaining pastry. Prick with a fork. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes or till golden. Serve piping hot topped with homemade ketchup or chili sauce.
SERVES 4-6
traditionally this is eaten hot after midnight mass on Christmas Eve.
